example_prompt: Permanently delete a customer from Notch Pay by their ID.

id.description: Unique identifier of the customer to delete. Interpolated into the URL path.

customer.description: Always an empty array [] after successful deletion.

gotchas: Deletion is permanent and irreversible. There is no soft-delete or recycle bin — once deleted, the customer and all associated data cannot be recovered via the API.
A 404 is returned if the customer ID does not exist or no longer belongs to your account. Check for 404 separately from other error codes.
Deleting a customer does not automatically cancel or refund any associated payments. Resolve outstanding transactions before deleting the customer record.
